Govt Policy Rail

National Tourism Initiatives

₹1,400 Crores Allocation

Swadesh Darshan 2.0

Ministry of Tourism

Developing sustainable and responsible tourist destinations across 30+ Indian states and territories.

Explore Program
₹800 Crores Allocation

PRASHAD Scheme

Ministry of Tourism

Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual, Heritage Augmentation Drive to beautify holy pilgrimage centers.

Explore Program
₹250 Crores Allocation

Dekho Apna Desh

Ministry of External Affairs

Promotional campaigns and financial subsidies encouraging domestic citizens to explore heritage sights.

Explore Program
₹4,800 Crores Allocation

Vibrant Villages Program

Ministry of Home Affairs

Transforming northern border villages into eco-tourism hubs, creating local home-stays and trails.

Explore Program

1950
History Trail

Tourism States Foundation Timeline

Foundation milestones of Indian States and Union Territories. Scroll down to advance years.

24 Jan 1950

Uttar Pradesh

Establishment of United Provinces, renamed as Uttar Pradesh.

26 Jan 1956

Bihar

Reorganized as a state under the States Reorganisation Act.

1 Nov 1956

Karnataka

Formation of Mysore State, later renamed Karnataka.

1 Nov 1956

Kerala

Integration of Malabar and Travancore-Cochin into Kerala.

1 May 1960

Maharashtra

Bifurcation of Bombay State into Maharashtra & Gujarat.

1 May 1960

Gujarat

Celebration of Gujarat Foundation Day.

1 Dec 1963

Nagaland

Inauguration as the 16th state of the Indian Union.

1 Nov 1966

Haryana

Bifurcated from Punjab to create a separate state.

1 Nov 1966

Punjab

Punjab Day, reflecting state boundary updates.

25 Jan 1971

Himachal Pradesh

Achieved full statehood status from union territory.

21 Jan 1972

Manipur

Elevated to full statehood alongside Meghalaya.

21 Jan 1972

Meghalaya

Achieved complete autonomous state status.

21 Jan 1972

Tripura

Statehood Day marking integration of the kingdom.

16 May 1975

Sikkim

Merged as the 22nd state of the Indian Union.

20 Feb 1887

Mizoram

Attained statehood following the Mizoram Peace Accord.

20 Feb 1987

Arunachal Pradesh

Upgraded from Union Territory to India's 24th state.

30 May 1987

Goa

Separated from Daman & Diu to become a full state.

1 Nov 2000

Chhattisgarh

Carved out from Madhya Pradesh's eastern districts.

9 Nov 2000

Uttarakhand

Formed from the northwestern districts of Uttar Pradesh.

15 Nov 2000

Jharkhand

Carved from southern Bihar on Birsa Munda birth date.

2 Jun 2014

Telangana

Formed as India's newest state from Andhra Pradesh.

31 Oct 2019

Ladakh

Established as an independent Union Territory.

31 Oct 2019

Jammu & Kashmir

Reorganized into a separate Union Territory.
